name: Ming Dynasty
note: Founded as an explicit rejection of Mongol rule; strong Han nativist and Confucian identity; the 'most Chinese' of dynasties

figures.name: Zhu Yuanzhang (Hongwu Emperor)
figures.significance: Rose from orphaned peasant to emperor; expelled the Mongols

figures.name: Zheng He
figures.significance: Led seven maritime expeditions reaching Arabia and East Africa; commanded fleets that dwarfed anything in Europe

figures.name: Yongle Emperor
figures.significance: Built the Forbidden City; commissioned the Yongle Encyclopedia
